version.description: Manifest schema version. Use 1 for this contract.

schema_version.description: Alternate manifest schema version field. Use 1 for this contract.

governed_paths.description: Relative glob patterns whose findings are governed by design-stage OpenSpec binding evaluation.

advisory_only_paths.description: Relative glob patterns whose findings are advisory and Issues-only, not fix-stage work authority.

safeRelativeGlob.description: Safe relative glob using forward slashes only; absolute paths, empty paths, and parent traversal are forbidden.
